inputs.vague: The Spirit Director wants to find SuperFrog Students based on certain criteria. The system will gather the search values and then present a list of all students that meet those specified criteria. This allows the Director to see relevant student information.
inputs.detailed:
Primary Actor:
Spirit Director
Secondary Actors:


Trigger:
The Spirit Director indicates to find SuperFrog Students.
Description:
The Spirit Director wants to find SuperFrog Students which match specific criteria, so that she can decide what to do next.
Preconditions:
PRE-1. The Spirit Director is logged into the System.
PRE-2. The User has the “admin” privilege.
Postconditions:
POST-1. A list of matching SuperFrog Students is returned and displayed to the Spirit Director. It is possible that the list is empty.
Main Success Scenario:
The Spirit Director indicates to find SuperFrog Students.
The System asks the Spirit Director to enter search values according to the “Search criteria” defined in the Associated Information of this use case.
The Spirit Director enters one or more search values and confirms that she has finished entering.
The System finds all SuperFrog Students that match the provided search criteria values.
The System displays the matching SuperFrog Students according to the “Search results display strategy” and the “Sort criteria” defined in the Associated Information of this use case.
Use case ends.
Extensions:
4a. No matching students are found:
4a1. The System alerts the Spirit Director that no matching SuperFrog Students are found.
4a2. The Spirit Director either chooses to UC-13: Create an account for a new SuperFrog Student or chooses to terminate the use case or chooses to return to step 2 of the normal flow.
5a. The Spirit Director chooses to select a different set of properties to display the matching SuperFrog Students:
5a1. The System displays the current “Search results display strategy”.
5a2. The Spirit Director enters a customized “Search results display strategy”, confirms that she has finished entering, and returns to step 5 of the normal flow.
5b. The Spirit Director chooses to re-sort the search results:
5b1. The Spirit Director re-sorts the search result according to the “Sort criteria” defined in the Associated Information of this use case and returns to step 5 of the normal flow.

groundTruth.name: Find SuperFrog Students
groundTruth.summary: The Spirit Director wants to find SuperFrog Students who match specific criteria to decide what to do next.
preconditions: The Spirit Director is logged into the System.

steps.description: Asks the Spirit Director to enter search values according to the “Search criteria”.
Enters one or more search values and confirms completion.
Finds all SuperFrog Students that match the provided search criteria values.
Displays the matching SuperFrog Students according to the “Search results display strategy” and the “Sort criteria”.
Alerts the Spirit Director that no matching SuperFrog Students are found.
Chooses to create an account for a new SuperFrog Student.
Chooses to terminate the use case.
Chooses to return to step 2 of the normal flow.
Displays the current “Search results display strategy”.
Enters a customized “Search results display strategy”, confirms completion, and returns to step 5 of the normal flow.
Re-sorts the search results according to the “Sort criteria” and returns to step 5 of the normal flow.
